---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for TiaCommander
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the pain point.

## Proposed Solution

How do you envision this working?

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternatives or workarounds?

## Use Case

Describe a real-world scenario where this would help your workflow.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or examples that illustrate the idea.
